_comment: Hand-curated canonical glossary entries for UK public sector central buying agencies, procurement consortia, and aggregators. These entities are not government departments and therefore do not appear in the GOV.UK organisations API. They are merged into ~/.pwin/platform/buyer-canonical-glossary.json by pwin-platform/scripts/seed-canonical-buyers.py. Aliases were captured from real FTS publisher name variants observed in pwin-competitive-intel/db/bid_intel.db on 2026-04-11 — see DISCOVERY-REPORT.md addendum 1 for the variant catalogue and award counts.
open_questions: RESOLVED: NHMF (NPC) LIMITED is the National Housing Maintenance Forum 'NHMF Frameworx' procurement vehicle for housing estate services. Confirmed via FTS notice titles. Now included as a full entity below.
HealthTrust Europe agent-of-trust naming — collapsed to single HTE entry below; agent trust is preserved as a side-channel attribute at canonical layer time, not as separate canonical entries.
NHS Supply Chain operator chain — single canonical entry below; SCCL is the legal entity, NHS Supply Chain is the brand, DHL/NoE CPC are operators acting as agents.
LHC vs SPA vs WPA — modelled as three distinct entries, with LHC as the parent buying group and SPA/WPA as devolved-nation alliances under it.

GOV.UK marks Crown Commercial Service as closed since 2026-03-31. Real restructuring vs data error to be confirmed at next GOV.UK refresh. CCS is included as a hand-curated active entity to preserve historical FTS coverage regardless.

aliases: NHS Shared Business Services Ltd (NHS SBS)
The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland)
The Common Services Agency(more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland)
The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) ("NSS")
The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) (NSS)
The Common Services Agency (more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) ("the Authority")
The Common Services Agency(more commonly known as NHS National Services Scotland) (NSS)
The Common Services Agency (more commonly referred to as NHS National Services Scotland (hereinafter referred to as the "Authority")
entities.notes: FTS publishers emit many verbose forms with abbreviation suffixes. Long-term, use prefix/substring matching ('starts with The Common Services Agency') rather than enumeration. For now, all observed variants are listed exhaustively.

aliases: NHS Supply Chain operated by Supply Chain Coordination Ltd (SCCL)
NHS Supply Chain Operated by Supply Chain Coordination Ltd (SCCL)
NHS Supply Chain Operated by Supply Chain Coordination Limited (SCCL)
NHS Supply Chain operated by North of England Commercial Procurement Collaborative

NHS Supply Chain operated by North of England Commercial Procurement Collaborative (who are hosted by Leeds and York Partnership NHS Foundation Trust) acting on behalf of Supply Chain Coordination Ltd
NHS Supply Chain operated by DHL Supply Chain Ltd acting as agent of Supply Chain Coordination Limited
NHS Supply Chain Operated by DHL Supply Chain Ltd acting as agent of Supply Chain Coordination Ltd (SCCL)
NHS Supply Chain Operated by DHL Supply Chain Limited acting as agent of Supply Chain Coordination Ltd
NHS Supply Chain Operated by DHL Supply Chain Limited acting as agent of Supply Chain Coordination Ltd (SCCL)
NHS Supply Chain Operated by Health Solutions Team Limited acting as agent of Supply Chain Coordination Ltd (SCCL)
entities.notes: SCCL is the legal entity, NHS Supply Chain is the brand. DHL Supply Chain, NoE CPC, and Health Solutions Team act as operating agents under contract. All variants collapse to one canonical entry. Long-term improvement: use prefix matching on 'NHS Supply Chain' rather than alias enumeration — every observed variant starts with that exact string.

aliases: NHS Wales Shared Services Partnership-Procurement Services (hosted by Velindre University NHS Trust)
NHS Wales Shared Services Partnership - Procurement Services (as hosted by Velindre University NHS Trust)
Velindre NHS Trust, NHS Wales Shared Services Partnership - Procurement Services
The Minister for the Cabinet Office acting through Crown Commercial Service
The Minister for the Cabinet Office acting through Crown Commercial Service (CCS)
Minister for the Cabinet Office Acting through Crown Commercial Service
The Minister for the Cabinet Office acting through Crown Commercial  Service
Minister for the Cabinet Office acting through the Cabinet Office
entities.notes: GOV.UK marks CCS as closed since 2026-03-31, which excludes it from the GOV.UK API fetch. CCS is the largest central buying agency in UK central government and is dominant in the historical FTS data, so we add it as a hand-curated active entity. Investigate the GOV.UK closure marker — possible restructuring or merger into another body, possible data error. The 'closed' status should be re-validated when the GOV.UK fetch is next refreshed.

aliases: ESPO on behalf of Leicestershire County Council
Leicestershire County Council t/a Leicestershire Traded Services (c/o ESPO)
Leicestershire County Council, trading as ESPO
entities.notes: ESPO is hosted by Leicestershire County Council. Parent ID added even though Leicestershire CC is itself in the local-government tier (will resolve when ONS LA codes are added in step 4 of Phase 1).

aliases: Business Services Organisation, Procurement and Logistics Service
Business Services Organisation Procurement and Logistics Service
Regional Business Services Organisation Procurement and Logistics Service
entities.notes: PaLS is the procurement arm of the Business Services Organisation, which serves all NI HSC trusts. BSO is the parent. Both are devolved Northern Ireland entities not on the GOV.UK organisations index.

aliases: LHC for the Scottish Procurement Alliance (SPA)
LHC on behalf of the Scottish Procurement Alliance (SPA)
LHC Procurement Group for the Scottish Procurement Alliance (SPA)
LHC Procurement Group on behalf of the Scottish Procurement Alliance (SPA)
LHC on behalf of Scottish Procurement Alliance
LHC Procurement Group for the Welsh Procurement Alliance (WPA)
LHC Procurement Group Ltd for the Welsh Procurement Alliance (WPA)

entities.notes: HTE acts as agent for many individual NHS trusts. The published buyer name often takes the form 'HealthTrust Europe LLP (HTE) acting on behalf of [Trust X]'. The matcher should detect any name beginning 'HealthTrust Europe LLP (HTE)' as canonical HTE; the on-behalf-of trust is preserved as a side-channel attribute, not as a separate canonical entity.

aliases: Association of North East Councils Limited trading as NEPO
The Association of North East Councils, trading as NEPO
Association of North East Councils Ltd trading as NEPO
THE ASSOCIATION OF NORTH EAST COUNCILS LIMITED T/A NORTH EAST PROCUREMENT ORGANISATION
The Association of North East Councils Limited

entities.canonical_name: Advanced Procurement for Universities and Colleges (Scotland)
aliases: Advanced Procurement for Universities and Colleges
Surrey and Borders Partnership NHS Foundation Trust on behalf of NHS Commercial Solutions

entities.notes: Alias-merge entry. Adds the legal-entity 'Limited' suffix forms to the existing GOV.UK 'national-highways' entry. National Highways was rebranded from Highways England in 2021.

Alias-merge entry. Highways England was the pre-2021 name for National Highways. Historical FTS records still use the old name. If GOV.UK doesn't have 'highways-england' as an active entry, this becomes a separate canonical entity (the rebrand history matters for time-bound queries).
Alias-merge entry. Adds the legal-entity 'Infrastructure Limited' suffix forms to the existing GOV.UK 'network-rail' entry.

entities.subtype: Functional body of the Greater London Authority
entities.notes: TfL is a functional body of the Greater London Authority and one of the UK's largest non-central-gov procurement entities. Not in the GOV.UK organisations API because it sits under the GLA, not central government. 254 ≥£1m awards in the historical FTS data.
NI's single education authority, formed in 2015 by merging the five Education and Library Boards. 267 ≥£1m awards. Devolved entity not on the GOV.UK organisations API.

Major housing association. 253 ≥£1m awards. Housing associations as a category are too numerous for full coverage in this glossary; the Hyde Group is added because of its scale. Future iterations may add the top 20 housing associations as a separate hand-curated bloc.

Identity confirmed 2026-04-11 via FTS notice titles ('NHMF Frameworx Estate Services Framework Agreements 2023'). Procurement vehicle for housing-sector estate services frameworks. (NPC) is the legal entity suffix. 605 ≥£1m awards in the historical FTS data.
